rationale: Educ. Code §21.035 governs delegation of authority for educator certification contested cases and agency administrative functions. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board is permitted to make a written delegation of authority to the commissioner or the agency to informally dispose of a contested case involving educator certification.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns educator certification administration and is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
